title: Simple Tsunamis
description: A simple mod that adds Tsunamis
body:
### **SIMPLE TSUNAMIS**

This mod adds Tsunamis!

Simple Tsunamis is in a Alpha State
<details>
<summary>Tsunamis</summary>

- Water Tsunami ![Water Tsunami](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/283cfc0a0b0dab87fd167ff75c97bf6751f4c796.png)
- Lava Tsunami ![Lava Tsunami](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d093f1f8a4e546f2c9c9b71d981de1d5ea469533.png)
- Void Fluid Tsunami ![Void Fluid Tsunami](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/159bfb7956fcf1f786515c1f5f7f87b1873fc0b4.png)
 <details>
 <summary>Planned Tsunamis</summary>
  <details>
  <summary>Spoiler Alert</summary>

   - TNT Tsunami
   - Mob Tsunami
   - Glitch Tsunami

  </details>
 </details>
 </details>

**currently you can't craft them.**


 Just place the Bucket of the Tsunami you want, and have fun!

---

**Will there be a Simple Tsunami's 2?**
  - Answer: **:)**

---

# **WARNING**
THIS MOD COULD CRASH YOUR MINECRAFT
